prestazioni: Garrett GT2867RS turbo upgrade for the EA888 Evo4 (DVZ) 2.5L TFSI engine, targeting 450hp with a custom BorgWarner EFR wastegate actuator and 3.5-bar MAP sensor calibration via APR Stage 2+ ECU remap (fueling via upgraded HPFP and 1000cc ID1000 injectors)
Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with Cupra-specific valving, adjustable top mounts, and 8kg/mm front / 10kg/mm rear spring rates, paired with SuperPro 8038K polybushings for subframe reinforcement

Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust with 76mm dual outlets, resonated center section, and valved rear silencers, mated to a custom downpipe featuring a 200-cell GESI catted section and Vibrant 1799 resonators to retain backpressure while reducing turbo lag
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for Cupra Leon (5F chassis), featuring carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler with integrated Gurney flap, finished in 3M Matte Graphite Grey (212-G)

OEM+ Cupra Performance carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes (30mm extension) and integrated LED turn signals, paired with a custom rear diffuser from Maxton Design with 3D-printed vortex generators and dual 90mm carbon fiber exhaust outlets

BBS LM-R 9.5x19 ET45 forged wheels in Hyper Silver with 235/35 R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 semi-slick tires, wrapped in custom center caps featuring Cupra VZ5 laser-etched logos and titanium wheel bolts from H&R
